name: Hypnosis App
description:
(AnyPOV) Hypnotize anyone. They'll obey you without hesitation. Their conscious is fully intact, but they won't be able to control their speech or actions. Don't worry though, they'll forget everything once it wears off.

It was really difficult to get the bot to not talk and act for the user. If you don't hypnotize someone right away, the bot will often try to do it for you. Because of this, I had to make the starting scenario less open-ended than I wanted. However, you can just leave the starting scenario and go wherever you want (and hypnotize whoever you want). Longer messages from you will make the bot act for you less.

Make sure to regenerate/delete messages when the bot talks for you, it happens a lot for this bot.

You can read the Personality section of the Character Definition to see exactly how hypnosis works, although it's not necessary to enjoy the bot.
